client_construction.code: this._kafka = new Kafka({ brokers: brokers.split(',') }); this._consumer = this._kafka.consumer({ groupId }); this._topic = topic;

primary_operations.name: consumeRaw
primary_operations.sdk_call: await this._consumer.connect(); await this._consumer.subscribe({ topic: this._topic, fromBeginning: false }); return new Promise((resolve) => { this._consumer.run({ eachMessage: async ({ message }) => resolve(message.value) }); });

code_style_notes: consumer.run is the long-poll loop; wrap in promise for one-shot fetch
